description: Azure DevOps integration hooks - lightweight SessionStart profile/data health check, role-based write validation, and a conservative git remote-write gate. Matchers are namespace-agnostic: they match both the legacy 'mcp__azure-devops__*' and the current plugin-namespaced 'mcp__plugin_devops_azure-devops__*' tool names. (MCP error-recovery guidance is provided in-context via devops/MCP_FAILURE_MODES.md; Claude Code has no per-tool-failure hook event.)
